channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Git Link Detector - Sat May 30 09:48:35 UTC 2026
item.description:
Detects URLs printed to IntelliJ's git console output and surfaces them as clickable balloon notifications. Handles device-flow login URLs, pull request creation...
vendor: Przemysław eRIZ Pawliczuk downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: pl.eriz.gitlinkdetector

item.title: Flexible For OpenSCAD - Sun May 31 14:57:41 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Ilscipio GmbH downloads: 3 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.flexible.scad

item.title: ahu-tool - Wed Jun 03 02:55:55 UTC 2026

item.title: ArchLens Analysis - Mon May 25 16:16:04 UTC 2026

item.title: MybatisLogFormatSQL - Tue Jun 02 19:32:45 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Chicken - Sat May 30 21:32:46 UTC 2026
item.description:
JetBrains language support for the Chicken esoteric programming language. Provides .chicken file recognition, syntax highlighting, and a bundled Chicken runner.

item.title: IOSP Analyzer for Python - Tue Jun 02 17:08:16 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: CCD Akademie GmbH downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.ccdakademie.iospanalyzer.python
